name: Zinwell Corporation
summary: Zinwell Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of digital cable/satellite/terrestrial receiving, broadcast and broadband communication, IPTV receiving, and wireless equipment in Taiwan. It offers digital channel stacking switch (dCSS), low-noise block downconverter (LNB), headend system, and SAT>IP products; digital home entertainment products, including wireless video sender, set top box, soundbox, and soundbar; and residential broadband products, such as G.hn, G.fast, Wi-Fi, and MoCA solutions, as well as 5G, 4G LTE, and IoT solutions. The company also provides CATV/MATV transmission products that comprise optoelectronic, CATV outdoor amplifier, CATV outdoor passive, CATV/MATV indoor amplifier, CATV outdoor passive, and satellite TV distribution services. Zinwell Corporation was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
